tagline: Change is possible, one farm at a time.

hero.title: Coffee with purpose, roasted with care.
hero.subtitle: A simplified showcase of our essential microlots, memberships, and goods. When you're ready, we take your order on WhatsApp.

price.approx_hint: Indicative price from desnudocoffee.com — confirm when you order.

cart.title: Your selection
cart.subtitle: No checkout here — we finalize everything on WhatsApp.
cart.empty: Tap “Add” on any item to build an inquiry.
cart.configure_phone: Set VITE_WHATSAPP_PHONE in your environment to enable WhatsApp links.

whatsapp.intro: Hello Desnudo Coffee — I'd like to inquire about:

footer.rights: © {{year}} Desnudo Coffee. Inspired by desnudocoffee.com — independent showcase.

coffee_community_lot.name: Community Lot | Washed | dark chocolate, toffee and thyme
coffee_community_lot.summary: Colombia community microlot — washed, comforting dark chocolate and toffee with a hint of thyme. Easy as drip or a mellow daily cup.

coffee_colombia_miel.name: Colombia Miel | Yellow Honey
coffee_colombia_miel.summary: Yellow honey process — quince, pecan and green grape in a sweet, structured cup inspired by the shop listing.

coffee_gesha_washed.name: Gesha | Washed
coffee_gesha_washed.summary: Gesha elegance in a washed cup — floral highs, refined sweetness and a tea-like finish. Same tier as their High Tea Gesha line.

coffee_java_honey.name: Java | Honey
coffee_java_honey.summary: Java with honey process — sweet lemon, malty depth and a silky mouthfeel; great for pour-over or espresso.

coffee_java_wild_natural.name: Java | Wild Natural
coffee_java_wild_natural.summary: Wild natural Java — yellow fruit, green apple and honeyed brightness; lively as espresso or filter.

coffee_caramel_apple_java.name: Caramel Apple Java
coffee_caramel_apple_java.summary: Java profile with caramel-apple charm — green apple, nuts and vanilla-leaning sweetness.

coffee_caturra_esperanza.name: Caturra Esperanza
coffee_caturra_esperanza.summary: Caturra-forward lot — clean sweetness, gentle citrus and a dependable everyday profile.

coffee_bourbon_rosado.name: Bourbon Rosado
coffee_bourbon_rosado.summary: Rosado bourbon vibe — brown sugar, soft florals and dried red fruit in a balanced washed style.

coffee_ethiopian_washed.name: Ethiopian Washed
coffee_ethiopian_washed.summary: Classic washed Ethiopia — bergamot-leaning florals, citrus sparkle and a tea-light body.

coffee_suenios_decaf.name: Desnudo Sueños DECAF
coffee_suenios_decaf.summary: Decaf without compromise — frosted-flake sweetness, brown spice and dried orange peel in a cozy cup.

coffee_high_tea_gesha.name: High Tea Gesha
coffee_high_tea_gesha.summary: Their Gesha microlot — English breakfast tea, lemon balm and currant notes with Gesha clarity.

coffee_big_bag.name: The Desnudo Big Bag (5 lb)
coffee_big_bag.summary: Five pounds of fresh coffee — same spirit as the trailer line; choose grind when you order on the main site.

membership_bronze.name: Bronze Membership
membership_bronze.summary: Recurring fresh bags — pick profile and grind; optional SMS to choose each week’s roast on their flow.

membership_silver.name: Silver Membership
membership_silver.summary: Step-up tier with better per-bag value — more coffee, same membership perks they advertise.

membership_prepaid_year.name: Prepaid 1 Year Gift Membership
membership_prepaid_year.summary: Gift a full year upfront — prepaid plans and adventurous or traditional paths as on desnudocoffee.com.

membership_weekly_sub.name: Weekly subscription — freshly roasted coffee
membership_weekly_sub.summary: Weekly fresh-roast rhythm — aligned with their “Weekly Membership” cadence and SMS-friendly selection.

chocolate_70_dark.name: Desnudo Chocolate Bar · 70% Dark
chocolate_70_dark.summary: 70% dark bar — deep cocoa, minimal sugar; made to pair with afternoon espresso.

chocolate_50_milk.name: Desnudo Chocolate Bar · 50% Milk
chocolate_50_milk.summary: 50% milk chocolate — creamy, crowd-pleasing and easy to share.

merch_hat.name: Desnudo Hats
merch_hat.summary: Branded headwear — everyday Austin café energy between visits.

merch_tote.name: Desnudo Tote Bag
merch_tote.summary: Sturdy tote for beans, books or market runs — simple branding, daily use.

merch_tshirt.name: Desnudo T-Shirt
merch_tshirt.summary: Organic cotton pocket tees — soft daily wear with farm-inspired graphics from their merch line.

merch_egift.name: Desnudo E-Gift Card
merch_egift.summary: Digital gift card for their website — choose amount at checkout on the official store.
